title: crataegus angustifolia
intro: Crataegus angustifolia, also known as the Narrow-leaved Hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus angustifolia are said to include lowering blood pressure, improving heart health, and reducing symptoms of menopause and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Crataegus angustifolia include teas, tinctures, and capsules, often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being and cardiovascular health.
